title: Travel filter chip on AmEx credit cards page does not become selected / no visible change after clicks
description: On https://www.americanexpress.com/us/credit-cards/ under the 'Filter by' row, the 'Featured' chip remains selected (dark blue) while the 'Travel' chip stays unselected even after multiple clicks. Action feedback indicates 'NO element focused' suggesting the click may be missing or the chip is not responding. Expected: clicking 'Travel' should toggle it to selected and update the results list accordingly.
expected_behavior: Clicking the 'Travel' filter chip should select it (visual selected state) and filter the card results to travel cards.
actual_behavior: After repeated clicks, 'Featured' stays selected and 'Travel' remains unselected; no obvious results update and click feedback shows no focused element.
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to the 'Filter by' chips row
Observe that 'Travel' does not appear selected and results do not visibly change
